jobs.title: CarMax scraper
jobs.what: Best-value top-trim ICE-SUV finder (11–16k mi) with live KBB/Edmunds valuation of top 3
jobs.notes: Runs in parallel with Dhaka scraper (isolated browse sessions); same stamp-based retry no-op

jobs.title: Dhaka flights scraper
jobs.what: Scrapes Google Flights (BOS→DAC/BKK + Singapore-detour variant), publishes results site, Telegrams on crash
jobs.notes: Retry slots no-op after success via .last_run_date stamp; refuses to start after 5:30 AM

jobs.title: Fleet health check (all repos)
jobs.what: 13 data-level probes across every automation (scrapers, GH Actions repos, live sites) → Telegram digest, commits health.json + schedule.json
jobs.notes: The weekly "is everything working" check. Companion GitHub Action stamps results onto the GitHub Repos table.

jobs.title: Keep-awake
jobs.what: Prevents system sleep (display may still sleep) so the midnight jobs always fire
jobs.notes: KeepAlive restarts it if it dies; starts on login/reboot

jobs.title: Supervisor (mission watcher)
jobs.what: Watches Google Drive supervisor/inbox for MISSION.md files and runs an autonomous aider build loop; pings Telegram
jobs.notes: Idle unless a mission file is dropped in the inbox

jobs.title: T7 drive sync
jobs.what: Syncs files to the T7Files volume on the Samsung T7 drive
jobs.notes: Fleet health probes its launchd exit code weekly

jobs.title: Legacy Dhaka cron (8 AM)
jobs.what: Pre-launchd leftover of the Dhaka scraper schedule
jobs.notes: Harmless — .last_run_date stamp makes it log "Already ran today, skipping" — but it bypasses run_daily.sh's 5:30 AM guard on failure days. Candidate for removal (crontab -e).

jobs.title: Time Machine backup
jobs.what: Backs up the Mac to the encrypted T7Backup volume on the Samsung T7
jobs.notes: T7 must stay plugged in. TM cannot back up the T7 itself — photos' 2nd copy is iCloud only.

jobs.title: Notion health stamping
jobs.mechanism: GitHub Actions health.yml in github-notion-sync (cloud, not the Mac)
jobs.what: Reads health.json + schedule.json pushed by the 5 AM fleet check; stamps the GitHub Repos table and rebuilds the Mac Mini Schedule table
jobs.notes: Fails loudly if health.json is >8 days stale (i.e., the Mac-side check stopped running)
